description:
Updates the specified project user. The `country_code` and `state_code` parameter values must conform to the ISO-3166 Alpha-2 specification.
See [Working with Country Codes](/documentation/country-codes) for additional information. For OK responses with null values, the key will not be returned.

Note: The `is_active` parameter value requires
a boolean value to be passed in. Setting this parameter to false deactivates the user.
If you have deactivated a user by setting `is_active` to false an...

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

abbreviated_name.description: The Initials of the Project User

address.description: The street Address of the Project User

avatar.description:
Project User Avatar.
To upload avatar you must upload whole payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `user[avatar]` as file.

business_phone.description: The Business Phone number of the Project User

business_phone_extension.description: The Business Phone Extension of the Project User

city.description: The City in which the Project User resides

country_code.description: The Country Code of the Project User (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

email_address.description: The Email Address of the Project User

email_signature.description: The Email Signature of the Project User

employee_id.description: The Employee ID of the Project User

fax_number.description: The Fax Number of the Project User

first_name.description: The First Name of the Project User

is_active.description: The Active status of the Project User

is_employee.description: The Employee status of the Project User

job_title.description: The Job Title of the Project User

last_name.description: The Last Name of the Project User

mobile_phone.description: The Mobile Phone number of the Project User

notes.description: The Notes (notes/keywords/tags) of the Project User

state_code.description: The State Code of the Project User (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

vendor_id.description: The Vendor ID of the Project User

zip.description: The Zip Code of the Project User
